inline_comments: Add a reaction (emoji) to a message. @param emojiType - Feishu emoji type, e.g., "SMILE", "THUMBSUP", "HEART" @see https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/im-v1/message-reaction/emojis-introduce
Remove a reaction from a message.
List all reactions for a message.
Common Feishu emoji types for convenience. @see https://open.feishu.cn/document/server-docs/im-v1/message-reaction/emojis-introduce

functions.name: removeReactionFeishu
functions.doc: Remove a reaction from a message.

functions.doc: List all reactions for a message.
